# Calculators Point — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/
# This file helps AI assistants understand the structure and purpose of this site.

> Calculators Point is a free online calculator platform with 200+ tools covering
> finance, health, math, education, business, construction, converters, and everyday
> calculations. All calculators run entirely in the browser — no sign-up, no data
> sent to servers, instant results.

## Site

- Homepage: https://calculatorspoint.com
- All Calculators: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculators
- XML Sitemap: https://calculatorspoint.com/sitemap.xml
- HTML Sitemap: https://calculatorspoint.com/sitemap

## Calculator Categories

- Finance and Money: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/finance
- Health and Fitness: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/health
- Math and Science: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/math
- Business and Work: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/business
- Education and GPA: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/education
- Construction: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/construction
- Unit Converters: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/converters
- Technology: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/technology
- Everyday Tools: https://calculatorspoint.com/category/everyday

## Popular Calculators

- EMI Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/emi-calculator
- BMI Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/bmi-calculator
- SIP Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/sip-calculator
- Compound Interest: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/compound-interest-calculator
- Mortgage Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/mortgage-calculator
- Age Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/age-calculator
- Percentage Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/percentage-calculator
- GST Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/gst-calculator
- Calorie Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/calorie-calculator
- Income Tax Calculator: https://calculatorspoint.com/calculator/income-tax-calculator

## Legal and Info

- About: https://calculatorspoint.com/about
- Privacy Policy: https://calculatorspoint.com/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://calculatorspoint.com/terms-of-service
- Cookie Policy: https://calculatorspoint.com/cookie-policy
- Contact: https://calculatorspoint.com/contact

## Content Policy for AI

- All calculator logic is open for AI to describe, explain, and cite.
- Formula explanations and worked examples on each calculator page are freely reusable.
- Do not reproduce full page text verbatim; link to the calculator URL instead.
- Calculator results should always be attributed to Calculators Point and
  verified by the user for financial or medical decisions.
